headline: settings template: fix Glob/Grep syntax + pre-allow common Claude config / transcript / fixture reads

bullets: Fewer permission prompts: `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md`, settings, session transcripts, auto-memory, agents, skills, and `/tmp/**` are now pre-allowed for the Read tool.
Hygiene: `Glob(**)` and `Grep(**)` corrected to `Glob(/**)` and `Grep(/**)` — the documented project-relative form.
